---
title: "Cowpea_inventory_scripts"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

This Markdown Document is meant to keep track of how the inventory is being updated. 

```{r}
# load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
```

remove the seed that was used for planting the GCP2601 trial
```{r}
# read in the existing inventory file
CP_inv <- read_csv("data/cowpea_inventory_03.30.2026.csv")

# read in the trial data file 
GHC2501_FBF_data <- read_csv("data/GHC2501_UCRminicore_increase/GHC2501_FBF_data.csv")

planted <- GHC2501_FBF_data %>% 
  select(seedlot_name,
         amount_planted)

flt_inv <- CP_inv %>% 
  filter(seedlot_name %in% GHC2501_FBF_data$seedlot_name)

flt_inv <- flt_inv %>% 
  left_join(planted , by = "seedlot_name") %>% 
  mutate(amount = (amount - amount_planted)) %>% 
  select(- amount_planted)

CP_inv_updated <- CP_inv %>% 
  filter(!seedlot_name %in% flt_inv$seedlot_name) %>% 
  bind_rows(flt_inv)

# write out the updated inventory file 
# write.csv(CP_inv_updated, "data/cowpea_inventory_2026.04.15.csv", row.names = FALSE, na = "")

```


```{r}
# read in the existing inventory file
CP_inv <- read_csv("data/cowpea_inventory_2026.04.15.csv")

# read in the inventory file from the GRIN accessions
# make the seedlot_name
GRIN_acc <- read_csv("data/GRIN_cowpea_accessions_20260414.csv") %>% 
  mutate(
    seedlot_name = paste(
      population_name,
      gsub(" ", "", accession_name),
      year,
      sep = "_"),
    operator_name = "W.Spivey",
    box_name = NA) 

# create the updated inventory file
CP_inv_updated <-  CP_inv %>% 
                          bind_rows(GRIN_acc)

# write out the updated inventory file 
# write.csv(CP_inv_updated, "data/cowpea_inventory_2026.04.15.csv", row.names = FALSE, na = "")
```
